/usr/bin/ar qc libcppdap.a CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/content_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/nlohmann_json_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/null_json_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/protocol_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/protocol_requests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/protocol_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/protocol_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/typeinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppdap.dir/src/typeof.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcppdap.a
